doc.name: CPQR — production scenario
doc.description: Five-stage CPQR CJM with bidirectional in-route widget toggle. Payment cards use source-verified CPQR 140×96 anatomy, exact T-Bank/Alfa/SBP icon slots, loyalty capsules and prototype-owned selection.

screens.name: Главная — подключено
screens.note: Source state 1. Five verified product illustrations are pinned; exact QR/status/tab icons remain omitted because no mapped binaries are available.

screens.name: Шторка QR — до оплаты
screens.note: CJM stage 2 from user-supplied source: the curtain opens with switch ON and full payment-card carousel visible. Pressing the exact QR models the external cashier scan transition to processing.

props.text: Используя Яндекс Пэй, вы принимаете условия

screens.name: Платёж обрабатывается
screens.note: Source state 3. Automatic completion is a bounded CPQR-004 trigger assumption.

screens.name: Платёж выполнен
screens.note: Source state 4. Exact merchant, points and card-preview assets are pinned; unavailable branded/decorative visuals are omitted.

props.title: START
props.subtitle: Открой карту Пэй и получи доступ

screens.name: Шторка QR — возврат
screens.note: CJM stage 5 from user-supplied source: after successful payment the user returns to the same active QR curtain with switch ON and carousel visible.

props.text: Используя Яндекс Пэй, вы принимаете условия
